step_by_step_thinking:
I agree with agent1's conclusion that **tafenoquine is clinically indicated only as a radical cure of P. vivax**, which includes clearing both liver stages and gametocytes. This aligns strictly with WHO guidelines — it has no role in preventing malaria in pregnant women, treating severe falciparum cases, or managing pediatric malaria due to lack of efficacy or safety data in those populations.
